content.en:
You must know that in the universe, except for the Origin Realm, the cosmic gods are basically pseudo-fourth-order lifeforms, and most of the sons of those epochs in the twelve cosmic epochs are only fifth-order lifeforms, and he is about to become a seventh-order life.

It can be said that he will be the only cultivator in this universe who has entered the seventh-order life level.

"The Origin Realm really contains great opportunities, not only the Origin Well, but also the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass and other treasures, it is really lucky to be able to enter here!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he newly operated the Tianyuan True Method to refine the Seven-Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, and took out a bunch of treasures that could improve the strength of the physical body and swallowed them one by one.

Ten years later, on this day.

Ye Tian's body finally ushered in a real transformation.

A breath belonging to the seventh order of life emanated from Ye Tian's body, and his strength was also soaring to an incredible degree.

After a long time, Ye Tian opened his eyes.

"Seventh-order life, I've finally reached it!"

Ye Tian smiled.

At this moment, the strength of his physical body is much stronger than that, if he was able to match the average top Source Emperor in the Origin Realm before, then now it is enough to crush any Source Emperor, and he can even fight with the weaker Source Emperor.

However, it is only a fight of one or two, if you really fight, he is still not the opponent of Emperor Yuan, he can only fight one or two and then escape, and he can only escape at the hands of Emperor Yuan with the help of the Sea of Death Flowers and the Chaos Origin Ancient Well before.

It can be said that Ye Tian is now a huge progress!

And this time, he broke through to the seventh-order life, not only did the physical strength skyrocket, but he also had one more ability, a special ability that belonged to the seventh-order life-

"Life Heavenly Pupil!"

Ye Tian urged this special ability, and a strange blue light appeared in his eyes, turning his eyes into the Heavenly Pupil of Life.

The Life Heavenly Pupil has no attack and defense capabilities, just an auxiliary ability, but it is very anti-heavenly, because this ability can sense the breath of life in a territory, as long as it is life, and it is not higher than the seventh-order life, it cannot escape the detection of the Life Heavenly Pupil, and the scope of this exploration is too wide, it is definitely an anti-heaven ability of the exploration type!

"With the Heavenly Pupil of Life, in terms of exploration, the Supreme is not as powerful as me!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he used the Life Heavenly Pupil to begin to explore the life of the Origin Realm.

Rumble!!!

The life of a territory in the Origin Realm all appeared in Ye Tian's Life Heavenly Pupil Induction, and countless life breaths appeared in the void picture in front of him.

He could even judge the other party's life level based on these life breaths.

"There are a lot of fourth- and fifth-order lifeforms, and there are also a lot of sixth-order lifeforms, but the seventh-order didn't find it, the life pupil can only sense the lives below the seventh-order life, which is also a good thing, otherwise other seventh-order lifeforms may also be able to sense my existence!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He continued to probe the life level of these source beasts, and he didn't feel bored at all, and half a day passed in a blink of an eye.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian noticed one of the life breaths, this life breath was far away from him, but this breath was very special.

It was the breath of a sixth-order life, but its aura was very weak.

In other words, the quality of its life breath has reached the sixth order, but the breath is too weak, far inferior to the breath of other sixth-order lifeforms.

Although the aura of other sixth-order lifeforms was strong and weak, it was not weak to this extent.

"According to my guess, the owner of this breath of life is either a dying sixth-order lifeform or a ......"

Ye Tian thought of a possibility, that is, cubs!

The source beast cub is very weak, but its life level is fixed as soon as it is born, for example, the cub born of a sixth-order life is born a sixth-order life, but its cultivation is too weak, and the breath of life is naturally too weak, but even so, it is a genuine sixth-order life!

"If it is a dying sixth-order life, its value is limited, but if it is a sixth-order life cub, the value is too high!" Ye Tian was excited.

Because the sixth-order life cubs are very likely to be the origin ancestor cubs, because most of the source emperors are only fifth-order lifeforms, and a few are sixth-order lifeforms.

"There are only a few source beasts near this sixth-level life, and they are very weak, it shouldn't be in a group, this is an opportunity!"

Ye Tian didn't think about it for long, and immediately left.

If it was really a sixth-order life level Origin Ancestor cub, its value would definitely be much more precious than a piece of Supreme Treasure, and it would even be comparable to dozens of Supreme Treasures!

Before, Aurora was so crazy for a Source Emperor cub, you can imagine how high the value of the Source Ancestor cub is!

Due to the relatively long distance, and there will be many sixth-order lifeforms in the middle, these sixth-order lifeforms are not weak, and that breath of life makes Ye Tiandu marvel, it is definitely an existence above the Source Emperor.

Therefore, Ye Tian had to go around and not pass through their territory, so that his speed would be even slower.

Ten days later, Ye Tian finally arrived at his destination.

"The Land of Rocks, this was supposed to be a mountain range, but it was destroyed by the battle, forming this Land of Stones!"

Ye Tian didn't go to explore the reason for the formation of this area, but quickly went to the place where the sixth-order life breath was located.

However, he slowly moved over and reined in his breath.

After all, he didn't know the identity of that sixth-order life, in case it was a dying Origin Ancestor, wouldn't he be looking for death if he went over like this?

No matter how weak the Yuan Ancestor is, he can't kill it, so he must be careful and careful.

However, the possibility of the Origin Ancestor is not very large, so the sixth-order life breath is very stable, if it is the Origin Ancestor, he must find a way to restore the body, and the life breath cannot remain unchanged.

"The cubs are the most likely!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Soon, he finally approached the sixth-order lifeform.

"Formation?"

Ye Tian sensed the existence of the formation, and immediately found that this was a natural formation, not artificially arranged.

"Copy the talent, scout!"

Ye Tian swept through this area with his copying talent, and finally discovered the identity of that sixth-order life.

Talent Identification
Species: Two-horned round bear (cub)
Bloodline Talent: Mixed Level
Strength Talent: Godly (Extreme)
Speed Talent: Armaged
Defense Talent: God-level

......

"Sure enough, it's a cub!"

Ye Tian was excited.
